name: Dark Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3 packages (8 oz each) cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Vanilla Cookie Crust: Press the mixture evenly onto the bottom and up the side of a buttered 9-inch springform pan.
2. Melt chocolate over hot, not boiling, water; allow it to cool.
3. Preheat oven to 275°F (135°C).
4. Beat cream cheese, sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract in a large bowl with an electric mixer until smooth. Stir in the cooled melted chocolate and sour dairy cream until blended. Pour into the prepared pan.
5. Bake in the preheated moderate oven (275°F/135°C) for 1 hour and 45 minutes. Turn off the heat; let the cake cool in the oven with the door ajar. Remove from the oven to a wire rack; allow it to cool to room temperature before refrigerating. Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate curls, if desired.
